title: pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. acaulis
intro: Pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. acaulis, also known as white fumitory, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. acaulis is prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including urinary tract infections, fever, and skin irritations.
